infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is required to scan student QR codes.
infoPlist.NFCReaderUsageDescription: NFC access is required for the teacher app to read student broadcast tags.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to access your camera to scan attendance codes.

plugins.permission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to adjust screen brightness for QR visibility.

plugins.nfcPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to use NFC to read attendance broadcasts.
